title: Large Bounds Do But Bury Us.
content:
All things o'er-ruled are here by chance:
    The greatest man's inheritance,
    Where'er the lucky lot doth fall,
    Serves but for place of burial.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Large Bounds Do But Bury Us."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
